scope: Evidence 근거 링크 보기 click behavior fix
root_cause: TrendDetail evidence anchor had an onClick handler that called event.preventDefault(), so clicking 근거 링크 보기 never navigated to the evidence URL.

changes.src/components/TrendDetail.tsx: Removed preventDefault from evidence links and added target=_blank rel=noreferrer.
changes.tests/TrendDetail.test.tsx: Added regression test proving the evidence link keeps href and click default is not prevented.
changes.README.md: Documented evidence original-link behavior and new test file.

tdd.red: npm run test:run -- tests/TrendDetail.test.tsx -> failed because clickEvent.defaultPrevented was true
tdd.green: npm run test:run -- tests/TrendDetail.test.tsx -> 1 test passed

verification.unit_tests: npm run test:run -> 10 test files passed, 41 tests passed
verification.production_build: npm run build -> vite build success; dist/assets/index-BIkMJllw.js generated
